g.text: CPU support | cmpxchg16b | All x86-64 since K8/NetBurst
C11 _Atomic | Required | Ensures alignment + atomic ops
Only 48 bits usable on x86-64; upper 16 must be sign-extended
Initial | version=0, ptr=A | Stack: A -> B -> C
Thread 2 | push(X) @ recycled A| top={3,X}, A' at same addr
ABA prevented: version mismatch catches recycling
